entries.title: ON THE SECOND BOOK OF KINGS 5:17 on second-kings 5:17
entries.excerpt: Naaman the Aramean asked for some dust from the promised land in order to cause the shame of Israel, as I think, so that they might be ashamed that a stranger believed that even the dust of their land was filled with God, while the Hebrews did not even believe that God dwells in the prophets.
